title: Deputy Finance Lead (Real Estate)
description:
A visionnaire and market leader in RE sector, this Deputy Finance Lead is a pivotal member of the regional leadership team, you will drive the financial strategy and governance for a multi-billion dollar portfolio of hybrid RE funds and REITs. Reporting to the Regional Finance Lead, you will bridge the gap between technical accounting and high-level commercial strategy, ensuring shareholder interests are protected while aggressively pursuing regional growth.

Key Strategic Responsibilities
Fund & REIT Stewardship: Lead the end-to-end financial management for regional portfolios, ensuring strict compliance with REIT taxation, SGX/local listing rules, and cross-border governance.

Commercial Advisory & Profitability: Act as a core business partner to regional leads, providing advisory on pricing strategies, project cost reviews, and sales performance analysis to optimize portfolio IRR.

Joint Venture (JV) Leadership: Represent the company’s financial perspective at board-level meetings for multiple JVs, maintaining strong relationships with partners while safeguarding capital and ensuring operational performance.

Strategic Treasury & Financing: Partner with Group Treasury to manage project financing, oversee loan covenants, and optimize liquidity across diverse multi-jurisdictional portfolios.

Governance & Team Excellence: Lead a high-performing regional finance team, fostering a culture of financial discipline, robust audit controls, and risk-based decision-making across all entities.

Requirements

  • Bachelor’s degree in Finance or Accounting; professional certification (CPA, CA, or ACCA) is mandatory.
  • 10–15+ years of progressive finance leadership, with deep expertise in Private Funds, REIT structures, and Real Estate operations.
  • Proven success managing complex JVs and diverse stakeholders across Asia markets

All applications will be treated in the strictest confidence. Personal data provided will be used for recruitment purposes only.

Please apply with your CV in word document format. We regret to inform that only shortlisted candidates will be notified. For other positions related to real estate or other alternative investments, please go to https://careers.tri-cap.com.sg/.

EA Licence: 24S2282
​EA Personnel: R1107990
